name: SEO Knowledge OS — Cut A: Content-Node-SSOT View
intent: Bridge 7 fragmented SEO content sources (seo_documents, blog_articles, certification_seo_pages, seo_content_pages, profession_glossaries, product_persona_overlays, course_packages) into a single read-only node graph as the foundation for Cut B (refresh-queue producers) and Cut C (declarative conversion routing).
rationale: Pure read-only bridge. No new table, no producer changes, no data migration. View locked to service_role; client access only via admin-gated RPC.
